45mixtrackr

Upload your mix to identify every song — get titles, artists, album covers, and an SRT subtitle file.

Drop your mix here

or click to browse — MP3, MP4, WAV, M4A up to 500 MB

What you'll get

♪

Full tracklist — every identified song with title, artist, and album cover

◉

SRT subtitle file — import directly into DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or any video editor that supports subtitles. Song names appear as on-screen text, timed to when each track plays.

▤

Album covers ZIP — all artwork bundled and ready to use in thumbnails or social posts

See it in action

Frequently asked questions

Is 45 Mix Trackr free?

Free accounts get 3 mix identifications per month. Create a free account to get started — no credit card required.

What file formats are supported?

MP3, MP4, WAV, M4A, and AAC files up to 500 MB.

How long does it take?

Most mixes finish in 2–5 minutes. A one-hour mix typically takes around 3 minutes.

How accurate is the recognition?

We use ACRCloud audio fingerprinting — the same technology behind Shazam — which covers over 10 million songs. It works even through DJ blends and transitions.

What is the SRT file for?

Import it into DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut Pro to show song names as on-screen text in your mix video, perfectly timed to each track.

Does it work with vinyl mixes?

Yes. Any audio recording works, including vinyl sets.
